gpu_policy: use at most physical GPUs 2 and 3; never interrupt other users

SPRC shows full-parameter L2 protection alone does not prevent harmful correction

next_structural_direction: Behavior-Preserving Corrective Distillation: preserve baseline action logits/distribution while applying relation-specific TCAD gradients on eligible states; avoid new inference modules and avoid more alpha/module sweeps.
